global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with a central content area showcasing various shapes and text.
global.main_message: Promoting binge-watching content with a call to action.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Content area
elements.description: A central rectangular area with a light red hue, featuring abstract shapes and placeholders for images.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A large circular shape in a lighter shade of red, positioned within the content area.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A square shape in a lighter shade of red, also located within the content area.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon in the bottom section of the content area, colored in a light red.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon, similar in size and color to the previous one, located nearby.

elements.label: Arrow icon
elements.description: A small arrow icon pointing to the right, positioned at the top right corner of the content area.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' in white, located in the top left corner of the content area.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold headline text reading 'Binge starts now' in white, prominently displayed in the center of the content area.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now New hits every week

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'BingeLayer' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Book now' in white, located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: UGC text
elements.description: A small text label reading 'UGC' in white, positioned at the top left corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bold and colorful, promoting binge-watching content.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the logo is at the top, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: BingeLayer, Binge starts now, New hits every week, Book now, UGC
